data.title: Bitcoin Trading Volume Soars as Price Pumps to New Heights

data.title: Raoul Pal under fire for calling NFTs the ‘best long-term store of wealth’
data.description:
Raoul Pal, CEO of Real Vision and a prominent voice in macro investing, has once again stirred debate in the digital asset space, this time by declaring NFTs the “single best long-term store of wealth.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/raoul-pal-under-fire-for-calling-nfts-the-best-long-term-store-of-wealth/

data.title: Coinbase Breach: Crypto’s Weakest Link Isn’t Code — It’s People
data.description:
The latest crypto data breach underscores a simple truth: hackers target humans, not just software. Against this backdrop, Coinbase’s May 2025 breach delivers a stark warning.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/22/coinbase-breach-cryptos-weakest-link-isnt-code-its-people/

data.title: XRP Ledger Welcomes First MiCA-Compliant EURØP and Brazil’s USDB Stablecoins
data.description:
XRP Ledger has welcomed two stablecoins: EURØP, a MiCA-compliant euro token backed by European banks, and USDB, a dollar coin tied to Brazilian and US bonds. The launches strengthen XRPL’s role in tokenised finance, connecting institutions, DeFi and RWA markets in Europe and Latin America.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/xrp-ledger-welcomes-first-mica-compliant-europ-and-brazils-usdb-stablecoins/

data.title: Perpetual crypto futures could soon trade in the US: Outbound CFTC commissioner Mersinger
data.description:
Commissioner Summer Mersinger, who will be leaving the U. S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) at the end of May, has stated that perpetual crypto futures could soon gain regulatory approval. The outgoing CFTC commissioner has signaled the entry of the long-awaited perpetual crypto futures trading into the United States. US investors may soon have access […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/perpetual-crypto-futures-soon-us-cftc/

data.title: CFTC Signals Crypto Perps Could Trade in US as Commissioners Head for the Exits
data.description:
The CFTC is contending with a major leadership shakeup under President Trump as it weighs potential crypto regulation ahead.
source: https://decrypt.co/321692/cftc-crypto-perps-trade-us-commissioners-exit

data.title: Cetus Protocol Suspends Smart Contract After Major Security Breach
data.description:
Cetus Protocol pauses its smart contract due to a significant security breach affecting millions. Investigations are underway for fund recovery.
source: https://coincu.com/339190-cetus-protocol-contract-suspension

data.title: Solana climbs back into tokenization spotlight as R3 brings big banks to its rails
data.description:
Software development firm R3 has agreed to a deal with Solana Foundation to let its customers use the Solana network. The move could see Solana become a major tokenization hub. The UK-based firm announced the deal today, noting that collaboration will allow regulated financial institutions to bring their tokenized real-world assets to the network. R3 […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/solana-climbs-back-into-tokenization-spotlight-as-r3-brings-big-banks-to-its-rails/

data.title: Dem Rep. Waters issues new bill to curb crypto

Democrat representative Maxine Waters along with 14 other Democratic co-sponsors issued a new bill aimed at curbing President Trump’s cryptocurrency investments.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/dem-rep-waters-bill-curb-crypto/

data.title: BlockDAG Tops 2025’s Must-Watch Crypto List as Presale Hits $260M, While SUI Climbs & BNB Targets $720
data.description:
As the market shifts toward long-term winners, Binance Coin (BNB) and SUI are starting to draw serious attention. BNB is working to regain momentum with targets between $600 and $720. Meanwhile, SUI has broken free from a long-running downtrend and could be headed for more gains. Still, the project turning heads quietly is BlockDAG (BDAG),. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/blockdag-tops-2025s-must-watch-crypto-list-as-presale-hits-260m-while-sui-climbs-bnb-targets-720/

data.title: Department of Justice Charges Two Men in Alleged $227,000,000 Medicare Scam
data.description:
The U. S. Department of Justice (DOJ) is charging two men with running a $227 million Medicare scheme
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/22/department-of-justice-charges-two-men-in-alleged-227000000-medicare-scam/

data.title: Maxine Waters Slams Trump’s $TRUMP Gala, Drops ‘Stop Crypto Corruption’ Bill
data.description:
Maxine Waters has tabled legislation hours before Donald Trump’s $TRUMP investor dinner that would bar presidents, vice presidents, lawmakers and immediate families from owning enough crypto to change its code, citing growing scrutiny of political links to digital assets.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/maxine-waters-blocks-trump-trump-gala-bill/

data.title: What does Trump’s ‘big, beautiful’ budget bill mean for the US economy?
data.description:
Donald Trump has muscled his massive budget bill through the House of Representatives — and it took just one single vote to get it done. The legislation, which aims to extend expiring tax cuts and pour billions into border security, passed after weeks of infighting among Republicans. Trump, from the White House, made it clear […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trumps-big-beautiful-budget-bill-us-economy/

data.title: OpenFX Raises $23 Million to Expand Cross-Border Payments Network
data.description:
OpenFX secures $23M from Accel to enhance its stablecoin-based trading network, aiming to rival SWIFT in cross-border payments.
source: https://coincu.com/339187-openfx-23m-funding-stablecoin
